title: Best Oasis Weekly Recycling Market Report, 25 July 2025
section_path: Best Oasis Weekly Recycling Market Report, 25 July 2025
section_path_text: Best Oasis Weekly Recycling Market Report, 25 July 2025
summary:
Main
in Weekly Demolition Reports 26/07/2025
Ship recycling markets across South Asia and Türkiye remained quiet overall, though some regions are showing early signs of recovery. Source: Best Oasis Limited

Linked asset: 2025-07-26_Weekly-Ship-Recycling-Report-19-July-25-July-2025.pdf
Source asset: reports/hellenic/demolition/pdfs/2025-07-26_Weekly-Ship-Recycling-Report-19-July-25-July-2025.pdf

[Page 1]
Weekly Ship Recycling Report
19 July - 25 July 2025
Visit : www.best-oasis.com Head Office: 3201, Saba Tower 1, Cluster E, Jumeirah Lake Towers, Dubai, U.A.E
Email: bol@bol.ae Contact: +971 4575 4667

[Page 2]
Highlights of the week
Ship recycling markets across South Asia and Türkiye remained quiet overall, though some regions are showing early signs of recovery. Sentiment is still
cautious, but improving fundamentals are beginning to support a gradual return of interest.
